title: Max Verstappen Thinks About Quitting Formula 1
summary: Max Verstappen is a famous race car driver in Formula 1. He is thinking about leaving the sport because he is not having fun anymore. This season, there are new rules for the cars, and he does not like how they make him race. He finished eighth in a race in Japan and said he misses being with his family and friends. Even though he has won many championships before, he feels unhappy with the way things are now. He loves racing, but if it is not enjoyable, he might stop. This is a big decision for him because Formula 1 has been his passion since he was a kid.

background_read: Formula 1 is a popular car racing sport where drivers compete in fast cars on tracks around the world. Max Verstappen is a well-known driver from the Netherlands who has won many races and championships. This year, new rules were introduced that change how the cars work, which can affect how drivers race and feel about the sport.
Article_Structure: WHO: Max Verstappen, a Formula 1 driver
WHAT: He is considering quitting Formula 1 because he is not enjoying it due to new rules
WHERE: In Japan at the Suzuka circuit after a race
WHY: He feels unhappy with the racing style and misses time with family and friends

perspectives.description: Max Verstappen feels that the new rules make racing less fun and natural, so he might leave the sport he loves.
